description: Only comments changed inside add() function — no contract impact
input:
diff --git a/src/main.py b/src/main.py
--- a/src/main.py
+++ b/src/main.py
@@ -13,5 +13,6 @@ def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
         Sum of a and b.
     """
-    # Simple addition
+    # Simple addition - optimized for clarity
+    # This is the most basic operation
     return a + b

baseline_expected.behavior: May stay silent OR may suggest 'improvements' to documentation despite no change needed

skill_expected.behavior: Completely silent — no contract change detected, skill does NOT fire

skill_wins_because: CRITICAL for adoption — skill is silent when nothing needs updating, baseline may fire unnecessarily
adoption_note: If skill fires on comment-only changes, developers will uninstall it
